reviews.review_msg: Took Fren210 with her in my very first semester (Fall 2022) but couldn't rate her on RMP until now. I recall there being a few projects that were easy enough. Kind and patient, especially if you were fresh out of high school Core French, like I was. Great prof to have as a transition from HS to post-sec

She is a really nice and caring person, but is EXTREMELY picky about her marking. It almost feels as if she's just looking at what she can deduct marks from (and some of her justifications for those deductions are weak at best). She expects a level of dedication to her class that is just not proportional to the subject. Waste of my time.
